prompt:
STYLE: editorial-cool premium product hero, 1:1 square, 4K. Bold top-down composition with color blocking + light informational content. Magazine-spread energy.

BACKDROP: a textured deep MUTED SAGE-GREEN backdrop (with hint of brand-teal undertone) — matte linen-textured surface, soft cinematic light.

HERO COMPOSITION (top-down flat-lay): the Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold accents, label fully legible, gold lid, jar closed) centered, viewed straight DOWN from above so gold lid + circular top are visible. Around the jar arranged in a DYNAMIC PERFECT CIRCULAR HALO: 12 dark sugar-dusted gummy CUBES placed in an even ring, each ~30° apart. Subtle long radial shadows from each cube. A SHARP CLEAN SPECULAR HIGHLIGHT on the gold lid's curved edge.

LIGHTING: bright clean directional light from upper-left creating soft long shadows. Warm color-grade, editorial product-photography feel.

TEXT — restrained but informative. Two text elements in CLEAN WHITE typography:
  • At the TOP of the frame, large bold ALL-CAPS condensed-display headline (single line):
      'TWO A DAY.'
  • Below the headline, a small single-line tracked-caps sub-caption:
      'MORNING OR ANYTIME  ·  WITH OR WITHOUT FOOD'
  • At the BOTTOM of the frame (below the halo), a tiny single-line tag:
      '60 GUMMIES  ·  30-DAY SUPPLY  ·  DIETARY SUPPLEMENT'
Nothing else. NO feature pills, NO icons, NO bottom strip beyond the tiny tag.

DESIGN: editorial sage-green textured backdrop · bold halo composition · jar centered + 12 cubes in perfect ring · clean white typographic hierarchy · NO graphic-design noise.

RULES: all text cleanly spelled · 1:1 4K · sage-green textured backdrop (NOT flat white) · top-down composition · no border/frame · text limited to: 1-line headline + 1-line usage caption + 1-line supply tag.
